scripts.typecheck: bun x tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && bun x tsc --noEmit -p packages/htx-engine/tsconfig.json && bun x tsc --noEmit -p packages/htx-adapter-sqlite/tsconfig.json && bun x tsc --noEmit -p packages/htx-adapter-markdown/tsconfig.json && bun x tsc --noEmit -p packages/htx-cli/tsconfig.json && bun x tsc --noEmit -p packages/create-hypermedia-app/tsconfig.json
scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run test:smoke
